basic_details.job_title: GPSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 27 Nursing Officer, Junior Staff Officer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Nursing Officer/Principal, Nursing Suprintendent, Manager, Junior Staff Officer, Deputy Director, Women and Child Officer/Deputy Director
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Public Service Commission has released the official Nursing Officer, Junior Staff Officer and More Notification 2026 on 05 May 2026 at the official website GPSC Official Website. A total of 27 vacancies have been announced under the GPSC Nursing Officer, Junior Staff Officer and More Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 35 to 47 years with qualifications including Bachelor’s Degree, Post Graduate Degree, B.Sc Nursing, M.Sc Nursing, Ph.D, Diploma in Hotel Management and related qualifications can apply online from 05 May 2026 to 19 May 2026. The official notification PDF a

age_limit.details: The upper age limit is 47 years as on the last date of online application. Age relaxation is applicable to reserved category candidates as per Government of Gujarat rules.

qualification.nursing officer/principal, class-ii: Option A: M.Sc. (Nursing) + 3 years teaching experience OR Option B: Post Basic B.Sc. (Nursing) / B.Sc. (Nursing) + 5 years teaching experience (Experience must be in recognized Nursing College/School/Training Institution recognized by Indian Nursing Council on the post not below Nursing Tutor, Class-III)
qualification.nursing suprintendent, gujarat nursing s: A degree of M.Sc (Nursing), A degree of Post Basic B.Sc (Nursing)
qualification.omen and child officer/ deputy director: Possess a Post Graduate degree in Social Work or Sociology or Psychology obtained from any of the Universities
qualification.deputy director, gujarat stastical servi: Possess; a post graduate degree with at least second class in Statistics or Applied Statistics or Mathematical Statistics or Business Statistics or Economics or Applied Economics or Business Economics or Econometrics or Mathematics or Applied Mathematics or Advance Statistics as principal subject from any of the universities
qualification.manager grade i, general state service,: Degree in Hotel Management and catering obtained from National council of Hotel Management or obtained from any of the Universities, Diploma in Hotel Management and/or Catering Technology
qualification.deputy director of horticulture: A Ph. D degree in any branch of Horticulture, At least a second class post graduate degree in any branch of Horticulture
qualification.junior staff officer (administra tion),: possess a Bachelor's degree obtained from any of the Universities
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of online submission of applications.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Nursing Officer/Principal, Gujarat Nursing Service, Class-II
Principal, Gujarat Nursing Service, Class-1, Health & Family Welfare Department
Nursing Suprintendent, Gujarat Nursing Service, Class-2
Women and Child Officer/Deputy Director(Women Welfare)
Deputy Director, Class-1, Gujarat Statistical Service, General Administration Department
Manager, Grade-1, Class-2, Road and Building Department
Deputy Director of Horticulture, Class-1, Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Co-operation Department

selection_process: The selection process consists of Preliminary Test (Written Examination) followed by Interview.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted through online mode only on the GPSC OJAS portal. Candidates are advised to read the detailed instructions before filling the online application.
Candidates shall carefully read Advertisement No. and name of post before applying online. Candidate shall confirm the application only after verifying the details filled in the application form
The online application is "Editable" till the last date & time of advertisement. Hence the candidates are requested to submit only one application for each advertisement.

If there are any mistakes in filling up the details / information in the online application, go to the "Edit" option and update the details till the last date & time of Application. Do not make a new application.

Any request or representation to correct any error or omission in the confirmed online application or information filled in by the candidate shall not be accepted, once the online advertisement is closed.
In case of more than one online application made by the candidate, only the latest confirmed application will be considered valid by the Commission.
Candidates shall keep all the relevant Certificates/Documents ready as it may be required in case of eligibility for application scrutiny and Interview.
After publishing the list of ineligible candidates, the applications/documents of any candidate will not be accepted by the commission.
important_instructions: Only online applications will be accepted. Candidates must possess valid registration with Gujarat Nursing Council at the time of appointment. Experience certificate must be in the prescribed format only. Age relaxation and reservation benefits are applicable only to candidates of Gujarat Origin as per rules. Canvassing in any form shall disqualify the candidature. All updates will be available only on the official GPSC website.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for GPSC Recruitment 2026 is 19 May 2026 up to 11:59 PM. Candidates must complete the registration process through the official GPSC OJAS portal before the deadline. Late applications will not be accepted under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in GPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Gujarat Public Service Commission has announced a total of 27 vacancies for various posts including Nursing Officer, Principal, Junior Staff Officer, Deputy Director, Manager and more. The vacancies are distributed across multiple departments and reservation categories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for GPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The required qualification varies according to the post. Candidates with Bachelor’s Degree, Post Graduate Degree, B.Sc Nursing, M.Sc Nursing, Ph.D, Diploma in Hotel Management and related qualifications are eligible to apply for different posts under this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for GPSC Nursing Officer and other posts?
faq.answer: The minimum and maximum age limit differs post-wise in GPSC Recruitment 2026. Candidates between 35 to 47 years can apply depending on the specific post eligibility conditions mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for GPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Preliminary Written Examination followed by an Interview. The written test consists of General Studies and Concerned Subject papers carrying a total of 300 marks.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered under GPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive salary as per Gujarat Government Pay Matrix norms. The pay scale ranges from Rs. 44,900 to Rs. 2,09,200 depending on the post and department.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for GPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General and unreserved category candidates need to pay Rs.100 along with postal or online charges. Candidates belonging to SC, ST, SEBC, EWS, PwD and Ex-Servicemen categories of Gujarat origin are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply online for GPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official GPSC OJAS website by filling out the application form, uploading required documents and confirming the submission before the last date. Only online applications will be accepted by the commission.
